build.beforeDevCommand: npm run typecheck && npm run dev:web
build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run typecheck && npm run build:web

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http: https:
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:1420 http: https:

bundle.longDescription: DendroCapture - fast area and fullscreen screenshots with instant clipboard, local history, and Dendro Assets upload.
